projects.name: tamux
projects.description: A terminal multiplexer and user interface (TUI) with a super-powerful agent. Tamux is the only agent runtime that treats the daemon like an operating system kernel – sessions, targets, memory, management, and telemetry survive disconnections, and the agent can coordinate, vote, and reach consensus on decisions without an operator present.
